concepts.name: Tree
concepts.short_definition: A hierarchical data structure consisting of nodes connected by edges.

concepts.name: Node
concepts.short_definition: A fundamental unit within a tree, containing data and references to other nodes.

concepts.name: Edge
concepts.short_definition: A connection between two nodes in a tree, representing a parent-child relationship.

concepts.name: Root
concepts.short_definition: The topmost node in a tree, with no parent.

concepts.name: Parent
concepts.short_definition: A node that has one or more child nodes.

concepts.name: Child
concepts.short_definition: A node directly connected to a parent node.

concepts.name: Internal Node
concepts.short_definition: A node that has at least one child.

concepts.name: Height
concepts.short_definition: The length of the longest path from the root to a leaf node.

concepts.name: Depth
concepts.short_definition: The number of edges from the root to a specific node.
